## Walkthrough

Modified Gaussian kernel generation in `monai/losses/image_dissimilarity.py` to compute kernels analytically in Python rather than using the `gaussian_1d` utility function. The new implementation directly calculates a symmetric 1D Gaussian distribution with sigma derived from kernel size. Corresponding test additions validate kernel shape, symmetry properties, and regression behavior across multiple kernel sizes.

## Estimated code review effort

🎯 3 (Moderate) | ⏱️ ~18 minutes
